title: StatuteRates
description: The canonical, provenance-tracked database of statutory, judgment and tax interest rates — IRS §6621 quarterly rates, the U.S. federal post-judgment rate (28 U.S.C. §1961), and the 1-year Treasury CMT that drives it — each value stamped with its effective date and official source.
update_cadence: IRS quarterly; Treasury/post-judgment weekly (H.15 is daily).
attribution: Source values are U.S. federal government works (public domain). Compiled by StatuteRates.
license: Compiled dataset offered for reference; values trace to official public-domain sources (see each record).
disclaimer: Reference data, not legal, tax, or financial advice. Derived values (e.g. the post-judgment rate) show their formula; verify against the controlling statute/court before relying on them.

sources.name: Federal Reserve H.15 — 1-Year Treasury Constant Maturity
sources.publisher: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
sources.license: U.S. federal government work — public domain. Fed Data Download Program is a public bulk feed.

sources.name: IRS quarterly interest rates (§6621)
sources.license: U.S. federal government work — not subject to copyright (public domain).
